summary: REQ-1 is fully implemented: GirlsHomePage now fetches category header data via useGetAllCategoryHeaders, builds a headersMap, and renders the uploaded image when available with emoji fallback. REQ-2 is NOT implemented: the outer div still uses 'min-h-screen' with no explicit background color class to match other pages, meaning the body background color fix is missing.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the body background color of the For Her page (GirlsHomePage) to match the background color used on all other customer-facing pages.
missing_requirements.reason: The modified GirlsHomePage.tsx only uses 'min-h-screen' on the outer div with no background color class added. No background color change is present in the diff that would make it match HomePage or BoysHomePage. The known issue 'body background color is off-white instead of matching other pages' is not addressed.
